title: Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive

content.en: In Hualien, there is a very old village. It's Taibalang Tribal Village. People of the Amis tribe live there.
content.tw: 花蓮的太巴塱（ㄌㄤˇ）部落中住著許多阿美族人。

content.en: The village is next to two rivers. They are full of crabs!
content.tw: 部落旁有兩條河，河中很多螃蟹。

content.en: In the Amis language, "Taibalang" means "crab." The village was named for the crabs in the rivers.
content.tw: 在阿美族語中，太巴塱就是螃蟹的意思。這就是太巴塱部落名字的起源。

content.en: Taibalang has many old wood carvings. These are pictures cut into wood. There are many carvings of crabs!
content.tw: 太巴塱有很多古老的木雕，而且螃蟹圖案的木雕特別多！

content.en: There are also carvings of other animals and people. The people are hunting, fishing, and dancing! The carvings show the ways of the Amis people.
content.tw: 木雕上除了會出現各種動物之外，也會有阿美族人豐富的日常生活！

content.en: Many young people leave the village to work. But every summer, they come back. They help the village get ready for a big festival!
content.tw: 離開部落工作的年輕人會在夏天回來，一起幫忙舉辦祭典。

content.en: Elders teach young people how to help. Everyone has a job to do. They do things the Amis way. Helping the village keeps the ways of the Amis people alive.
content.tw: 部落的長輩負責傳授經驗。這樣子，來幫忙的年輕人才能將阿美族的傳統延續下去。

content.en: If you go to Hualien, go to Taibalang Tribal Village. Learn about the ways of the Amis people!
content.tw: 如果你去花蓮，一定要去太巴塱部落走走。去了解阿美族的生活方式吧！

vocabulary.preface: 阿美族太巴塱部落，很希望維繫他們的傳統。

content.text:
1. way 方式。
Living in an old village by the river…. 住在河邊的古老村落裡...
Isn’t that a nice way of living? 那不是很好的生活方式?

2. hunt 打獵。
I don’t know about that. 這我不知道。
People there hunt rabbits and catch crabs? 那裏的人獵殺兔子，吃螃蟹?
Why not? 為什麼不可以?

3. young 年輕的。
And older people can teach the young how to do things. 年紀大的可以教導年輕人做事情。
What kinds of things? 做怎樣的事?

4. wood 木頭。
Like…how to make a boat with wood. 比如說怎麼樣用木頭來造船。
So where’s this village of yours? 所以你這個村落在哪裡?
I have yet to find it. 我還在找。
Let’s go visit Taibalang Tribe together!

vocabulary.postscript:
來讀今天的單字。
way方式 hunt打獵 young年輕的 wood木頭

quiz.question: 1. What does "Taibalang" mean in Amis language?

content.en: How does rain make you feel? Rain makes some people sad.
content.tw: 下雨會讓你有什麼感覺？有些人在雨天心情低落。

content.en: An artist in the U.S. lives in a rainy city. He wants art and rain to make people happier.
content.tw: 美國一名藝術家住在一個多雨的城市。他希望藝術能讓大家開心一點。

content.en: The artist made a new paint. He cuts out words or pictures on cardboard. Then he puts the cardboard on a sidewalk. He sprays his paint on the cut-out parts. He takes off the cardboard. But, nothing is on the sidewalk!
content.tw: 他先在紙板上挖出他要的英文字或圖案，然後把紙板平放在人行道上。接著把他發明的新顏料噴在挖空的部分，再把紙板拿開。結果地上空空如也，看不到圖案。

content.en: There is nothing because there is no rain. When it rains, you can see the art!
content.tw: 原來因為地是乾的，所以什麼都看不到。等到下雨的時候，地上的畫就會出現！

content.en: The artist's city asked him to make art. He makes art near bus stops. Waiting in the rain makes some people sad. But now they see art: beautiful waves, sea lions, and more! They feel happy!
content.tw: 他的城市請他創作更多作品，於是他把很多圖案畫在公車站附近，大家雨天等車心情不好的時候，只要看到美麗的海浪或海獅，就高興一些。

content.en: The paint goes away after a few months. That is okay. It does not hurt the earth. Artists can make new art!
content.tw: 這種顏料幾個月後就會消失，也不傷害環境。藝術家還能再畫別的地面圖畫！

content.en: Now many cities have art with this paint. New Taipei did last year! Zhongshan Art Park says rain there becomes "a playful part of the art."
content.tw: 現在很多城市都有這種雨天藝術！連新北市去年也有，讓雨水參與藝術的創作。

content.en: Sidewalk art for rainy days makes people happy!
content.tw: 雨天的人行道藝術讓人感到快樂！

vocabulary.preface: 藝術家常常有辦法讓人開心。

content.text:
1. art 藝術。
Have you ever looked at a piece of art and felt happy? 你有沒有過看到藝術品，覺得很快樂?
Well, some artworks really touched me. 有的藝術品會讓我很感動。

2. beautiful 美麗的。
For example? 比如說呢?
“The Thinker” by Rodin. 羅丹的[沉思者]。
I know that sculpture! 我知道那座雕刻!
It’s beautiful but a bit sad.它很美，但是有點傷感。

3. artist 藝術家。
I saw an artist friend’s glass works a while ago. 我之前看到一個藝術家朋友的玻璃作品。
They are all about the sea and the sky. 都是表現大海跟天空。

4. put 放在。
I brought one home and put it on my desk. 我帶了一個回家放在桌上。
You like it a lot? 你很喜歡它?
Yeah. I can lose myself in it. 對，我可以迷失在其中。

vocabulary.postscript:
What kind of art do you like?
art藝術 beautiful美麗的 artist藝術家 put放在

quiz.question: 1. When can people see art made with this paint?
2. Where does this artist make art?
3. What does Zhongshan Art Park say rain becomes?
options: a. "A helpful part of the art"
b. "A playful part of the art"
c. "A wonderful part of the art"
